MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth N. Branham of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, (415-362-2580) for defendant / moving party Moore Dry Dock Company (sued herein as Moore Securities Company)
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Opiniano Jayme

RULING:
DEFENDANT MOORE DRY DOCK COMPANY (SUED HEREIN AS MOORE SECURITIES COMPANY)'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Moore Dry Dock Company (sued herein as Moore Securities Company)'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Order after hearing and order re: defendant's evidentiary objections signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
